c.d: The ability of the app to compare prices across different retailers and websites.
The availability of discounts, coupons, and promotional offers within the app.
c.s: The Coupons App, Sherpa Perks, RetailMeNot

c.n: User Interface and Ease of Use
c.d: How user-friendly and intuitive the app is.
Whether the app is available on multiple platforms such as iOS and Android.
The presence and quality of user reviews and community features within the app.
The ability of the app to send alerts and notifications for sales and promotions.
The ability of the app to scan barcodes for price comparison and product information.
Whether the app supports both in-store and online shopping experiences.
Whether the app specializes in specific product categories like electronics or toys.
